title: Delete Secret
content:
In this example we will delete the secret name `demosecret`. You can not edit a secret. If you need to update a secret, just delete and create it again with the new value.
=== "Kelvin UI" Click on the Secrets menu under Orchestration. Find the secret you want to delete and then click on the Delete icon { width=20 height=20 } in that row. You will then see a delete confirmation popup. You now have now permanently deleted an existing secret variable. === "Kelvin API" ```bash title="API cURL Example" linenums="1" curl -X "POST" \ "https:///api/v4/secrets/demosecret/delete" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer " \ -H "Accept: application/json" \ -d '' ``` The response code will be 200 or an error code from 4XX. === "Kelvin API Client (Python)" ```python title="API Client (Python) Example" linenums="1" from kelvin.api.client import Client # Login client = Client(url="https://", username="") client.login(password="") # Delete Secret response = client.secret.delete_secret(secret_name="demosecret") print(response) ``` You will see the output like this; ```bash title="API Client (Python) Example Response" linenums="1" None ``` === "Kelvin SDK" ```bash title="Kelvin SDK Command Line Example" linenums="1" kelvin secret delete demosecret ``` You will need to confirm the delete process and if everything went well you will get the confirmation response like this; ```bash title="Kelvin SDK Command Line Output" linenums="1" [kelvin.sdk][2025-03-19 21:08:12][I] Deleting secret(s) "demosecret" from the platform [kelvin.sdk][2025-03-19 21:08:12][W] This operation will delete the secret(s) "demosecret" from the platform Are you sure? [y/N] y [kelvin.sdk][2025-03-19 21:08:17][R] Secret "demosecret" successfully deleted from the platform ```

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api.client import Client

    # Login
    client = Client(url="https://<url.kelvin.ai>", username="<your_username>")
    client.login(password="<your_password>")

    # Delete Secret
    response = client.secret.delete_secret(secret_name="demosecret")

    print(response)
code_examples.title: API Client (Python) Example

code_examples.code:
[kelvin.sdk][2025-03-19 21:08:12][I] Deleting secret(s) "demosecret" from the platform
    [kelvin.sdk][2025-03-19 21:08:12][W] 
    This operation will delete the secret(s) "demosecret" from the platform
            Are you sure?  [y/N] y

    [kelvin.sdk][2025-03-19 21:08:17][R] Secret "demosecret" successfully deleted from the platform
code_examples.title: Kelvin SDK Command Line Output
